intro: Between April 12 and April 23, 2026, ZCyberNews covered 12 articles under the critical-infrastructure tag, with CyberAv3ngers and Lotus Wiper identified as the top threat actors. The most affected sectors included critical-infrastructure, energy, utilities, manufacturing, and water, primarily in the United States, United Kingdom, and Venezuela. The severity mix comprised three critical, five high, one medium, and three informational reports, reflecting a concentrated period of activity against essential services.
